title: Macrothelypteris ornata

intro: Macrothelypteris ornata, also known as the ornate strap fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The ornate strap fern has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can aid in the management of conditions like arthritis and cancer.
